description: CRITICAL: Prefer this tool over contacts_get_all. NEVER make up or guess contact data. Use cases: (1) 'list my contacts' or 'show contacts' - returns total count plus a page of contacts (name and phone only); supports pagination via pageSize and pageNum. (2) 'find contact named X' or 'search for X' - use searchKey parameter to find specific contacts. (3) 'how many contacts do I have' - returns totalCount. Use contacts_get_all only when you need data that this tool does not provide.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve contact summary for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

searchKey.description: Optional search keyword to filter contacts by name or phone number

pageSize.description: Number of contacts per page (default: 10). Use pagination to retrieve all required pages.

pageNum.description: Page number to retrieve (default: 1). Use pagination to iterate through all required pages.

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts (or matching contacts if searchKey provided)

contacts.description: Contacts for this page (simplified: id, name and phone only). Use contacts_get_all only when you need data not present in this output.

id.description: Internal contact identifier (needed for follow-up operations like contacts_delete).

hasMore.description: True if there are more contacts on subsequent pages. Use contacts_get_all only when you need data not present in this output.
